---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Summary
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you're requesting. -->

## 💡 Motivation / Problem
<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed? -->
<!-- e.g. "I'm always frustrated when..." or "This would allow users to..." -->

## 📐 Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe the solution you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible. -->

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
<!-- Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered. -->

## 📊 Impact
<!-- Who benefits from this feature and how? -->
- **Affected users:** <!-- e.g. all users / developers / admins -->
- **Use case:** <!-- Describe a real-world scenario -->

## 📎 Additional Context
<!-- Add mockups, links, references, or any other context here. -->
